title: daemon starts with no_identity fallback pub_id causing silent JMAP account failures
description: main.rs lines 77-83: when the keyfile is absent the daemon sets my_pub_id to the string 'no_identity' and continues startup. All JMAP account validation that compares accountId against my_pub_id will silently fail or produce nonsensical results. The daemon should refuse to start (or at minimum log a prominent error) rather than operating with a placeholder identity that will cause hard-to-diagnose failures for every JMAP client.
